Template

Micro Budget Reset template

A one-page reset for seeing near-term bills, small leaks, and the next cash decision.

Download page Download ZIP Open latest pack Listing copy Support this template

Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary through the connected support path. This page is a stable discovery surface, not proof of revenue.

Latest version

May 23, 2026

Template

Who this helps

Solo households and freelancers who need a short money picture without a complex finance app.

Home Admin Digital Product Prep Cleanup And Reset

Unattended delivery

What this page connects

The stable template URL points to the latest dated pack page, public download page, ZIP file, listing copy, topic pages, collection offers, and starter bundle.

1
Inspect the pack

Open the latest generated pack page.

2
Download the file

Download page or Download ZIP.

3
Use or list it

Listing copy and the store import kit are ready for a future checkout platform.

4
Revenue boundary

Product checkout is not connected. Support is voluntary and routed through CalmSprout when selected.

Related offer paths

Bundles and collections

These links make the template easier to discover and support without requiring manual fulfillment.

Download starter bundle Templates JSON Open support page Open Home Admin offer Open Digital Product Prep offer Open Cleanup And Reset offer

Support links route to a Square-hosted CalmSprout gift-card/support page. Product checkout is not connected yet; pack downloads remain public until a store is connected.
